title: Bitter Crisp Turkish Beans Stir-fry
description: A nostalgic twist on traditional refried beans with a touch of bitterness for a unique flavor profile, this dish is both savory and light enough to be enjoyed as a snack or appetizer.

ingredients.name: Lemon Juice
ingredients.notes: To balance the flavors and add freshness

ingredients.name: Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: For cooking and adding richness to the dish

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine refried beans, finely chopped green onions, tomato paste, garlic powder (if using), lemon juice, olive oil, and salt.
Mix all the ingredients thoroughly until evenly distributed.
Transfer the mixture to a skillet or non-stick frying pan over medium-high heat. Stir frequently for about 5 minutes or until it starts to stick together slightly and forms small clusters.
Serve hot as is or garnish with additional green onions, if desired.
